name: Lavender
summary: Lean bulk ingestion row for Lavandula angustifolia.
description: Lean bulk ingestion row for Lavandula angustifolia. Key active compounds include Linalool.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

sources.title: Biological activities of lavender essential oil
Effects of lavender on anxiety: A systematic review and meta-analysis
Herbal medicine for depression and anxiety: A systematic review with assessment of potential psycho-oncologic relevance
Efficacy of Silexan in patients with anxiety disorders: a meta-analysis of randomized, placebo-controlled trials
sources.authors: M. Dold; L. Bartova; H. Volz; E. Seifritz; H. Möller; S. Schläfke; S. Kasper
sources.journal: European Archives of Psychiatry and Clinical Neuroscience
sources.note: oral lavender oil/Silexan 80 mg/day anxiety evidence and tolerability

claimMap.claim: Oral Silexan 80 mg/day for 10 weeks reduced anxiety symptoms versus placebo in adult anxiety trials.
claimMap.notes: Oral Silexan 80 mg/day for 10 weeks reduced anxiety symptoms versus placebo in adult anxiety trials.

qualifiers.population: Adult outpatients with subthreshold anxiety, MADD, or GAD

dosage: Silexan 80 mg/day orally for 10 weeks in meta-analysis. Do not generalize to all lavender oils/teas/aromatherapy. | Proprietary oral lavender oil preparation (Silexan); separate from essential-oil inhalation and topical lavender.
typical_dosage: Silexan 80 mg/day orally for 10 weeks in meta-analysis. Do not generalize to all lavender oils/teas/aromatherapy. | Proprietary oral lavender oil preparation (Silexan); separate from essential-oil inhalation and topical lavender.
